name: Workspace Init
description: Bootstraps a worktree for Code Workbench use: creates .code-workbench/ structure, writes per-worktree VS Code color customizations for the status bar, and sets up any required config files. Also called when worktree color preferences change.
guidelines: writeWorktreeWorkspaceColors must strip legacy color keys (activity bar, side bar) from existing settings.json on every write to converge old checkouts on the current scoped palette.
Init operations should be idempotent — re-running must not overwrite user edits to files that already exist.
anti_patterns: Do not tint activity bar or side bar — only the status bar strip is colored. Legacy keys must be actively removed.
decisions: Per-worktree color is written into the worktree's .vscode/settings.json so the color persists even if the user reopens without the extension active.
